message.content:
@startuml
participant AddressPanel : JPanel
participant ContactsController
note right of ContactsController
  double clicks on
  the contact to open a window
end note

actor AddressPanel : JPanel
participant ContactsController

participant addressFrame : JFrame
participant Persistence
participant RepositoryFactory
participant ContactsRepository
participant BufferedReader
participant FileReader

ContactsController ..> addressFrame : new (contact)

ContactsController ..> addressFrame : tmp = validatePostalCode(postalCode)

ContactsController ..> BufferedReader : create()

ContactsController ..> BufferedReader : create(file_name)

loop [while there are lines to read]
  ContactsController ..> BufferedReader : readline()
end loop

alt [tmp == true]
  ContactsController ..> addressFrame : updateAddress(contact, main_address, secondary_address)
  ContactsController ..> RepositoryFactory : getRepositoryFactory()
  RepositoryFactory ..> Persistence : newInstance()
  ContactsController ..> ContactsRepository : getContactsRepository()
  ContactsController ..> ContactsRepository : update(contact)
end alt

@enduml
